notifications.title: Water check
notifications.body: You are under half of today’s water goal. Tap +250 ml before lunch.

notifications.title: Meal gap
notifications.body: No food logged since breakfast. Add a preset snack so the coach stays accurate.

notifications.title: Calorie runway
notifications.body: Plenty remaining before dinner. Keep protein ahead of late snacks.

notifications.title: Live Activity ready
notifications.body: Start a Live Activity before a busy afternoon — glance remaining kcal from the island.

notifications.title: Coach tip
notifications.body: Ask Health Coach for one 20-minute walk, not a full plan rewrite.

notifications.title: Body weekly
notifications.body: Update weight once this week. Daily scale noise makes your goal jitter.

notifications.title: Burn logged?
notifications.body: If you trained, add a burn preset so remaining calories reflect real output.

notifications.title: Journal nudge
notifications.body: Write a short note on energy and hunger. Tomorrow’s coach reads the pattern.
